creator: th@cis.ibaraki.ac.jp
text:
Change MASTER_SITES and DISTNAME.
    Makefile and files/md5 must be changed.

Fix: -DISTNAME=	xbaby-1.2-ss-9.03
-PKGNAME=	xbaby-1.2
+DISTNAME=	xbaby-pl2
 CATEGORIES=	games
-MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.u-tokyo.ac.jp/pub/hpux9/X11/Misc/xbaby-1.2/
+MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.inria.fr/X/contrib-R5/games/
+EXTRACT_SUFX=	.tar.Z

 MAINTAINER=	th@cis.ibaraki.ac.jp
-
-WRKSRC=	${WRKDIR}/xbaby-1.2

 MAN1=		xbaby.1
 USE_IMAKE=	yes
